title: Write API reference docs for an existing REST module
instruction: The tasks REST router (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /tasks) has no documentation. Write docs/api/tasks.md documenting each endpoint: method, path, params, request/response shapes, status codes, and a curl example. Derive everything from the actual router code; do not invent endpoints.

criteria.guidance: Are all four endpoints and their params/responses/status codes documented?
Does the doc match the real router (no invented endpoints)?
Is it well-structured with a working curl example?
